hero.subtitle: Mezzofy is the supply layer that AI shopping agents query in real time. When ChatGPT, Gemini, or Kimi recommend a deal, it comes from the Mezzofy Exchange — tokenized, fraud-proof, and ready to redeem. 900M+ weekly AI users. Your merchant inventory. One integration.

shift.title: The Next Distribution Channel Isn't an App — It's an AI Agent
shift.subtitle: Consumers are shifting from searching for deals to asking AI to find them.

card1.title: Agentic Commerce is Live
card1.description: ChatGPT launched Instant Checkout, Google announced Universal Commerce Protocol

card3.title: Structured Data Wins
card3.description: Unstructured promotions are invisible to AI

protocols.title: Three Protocols, One Supply Layer
protocols.subtitle: Mezzofy exposes your merchant coupon inventory to the world's largest AI platforms through standardized commerce protocols. One listing in the Mezzofy Exchange = discoverable across all three.

acp.title: ChatGPT — Agentic Commerce Protocol
acp.description: User asks 'find me a dining deal near Bukit Bintang' → ChatGPT queries Mezzofy API

benefit1.title: 900M Weekly Users
benefit1.description: Largest AI user base globally, high purchase intent

benefit2.title: 4% Transaction Fee Model
benefit2.description: Aligns with Mezzofy's performance-based revenue structure

benefit3.title: Instant Checkout
benefit3.description: Complete redemption within the chat interface, no app switching

benefit4.title: Zero Merchant Effort
benefit4.description: Merchants listed in the Mezzofy supply pool are automatically discoverable

ucp.title: Google Gemini — Universal Commerce Protocol
ucp.description: Gemini's 45 billion-item Shopping Graph now includes promotions

benefit1.title: 45B-Item Shopping Graph
benefit1.description: Mezzofy coupons indexed alongside the world's largest product catalog

benefit2.title: Cross-Surface Distribution
benefit2.description: Coupons surface in Google Search, Maps, Shopping, and Assistant

benefit3.title: Backed by Major Partners
benefit3.description: Walmart, Target, Shopify, Mastercard, and Visa are UCP launch partners

benefit4.title: Conditional Triggers
benefit4.description: Consumers set preferences; Gemini automatically matches Mezzofy inventory

mcp.title: Kimi & Regional AI Agents
mcp.description: Moonshot AI's Kimi dominates Chinese-speaking markets

benefit3.title: Multi-Language Support
benefit3.description: Mezzofy already supports Traditional and Simplified Chinese

benefit4.title: Open Protocol
benefit4.description: MCP and REST API enable integration with any emerging AI agent platform

howItWorks.title: From Merchant Listing to AI Redemption in Four Steps

step1.title: LIST
step1.description: Merchant lists coupon inventory in the Mezzofy Exchange via the self-serve supply portal. Zero upfront cost.

step3.title: DISCOVER
step3.description: AI agents query Mezzofy supply in real time

step4.title: REDEEM
step4.description: Consumer redeems directly within the AI interface

opportunities.title: Beyond Discovery: The AI-Powered Product Suite
opportunities.subtitle: Coupon search is just the starting point. Mezzofy is building a full AI commerce intelligence layer on top of the exchange.

api.title: AI Shopping Agent API
api.description: Mezzofy becomes a registered data provider for ChatGPT (ACP) and Gemini (UCP). Merchants in the supply pool are automatically discoverable by 900M+ AI users globally.

intelligence.title: Predictive Coupon Intelligence
intelligence.description: Aggregate anonymized redemption data across thousands of merchants to build predictive models.

concierge.title: Conversational Commerce Concierge
concierge.description: White-label AI chat assistant embedded in demand buyer apps.

pricing.title: Dynamic Pricing & Smart Quotas
pricing.description: AI engine that automatically adjusts coupon availability based on redemption velocity, merchant capacity, and time-of-day demand.

fraud.title: AI-Powered Fraud Detection
fraud.description: Machine learning layer on top of tokenized validation. Detects anomalous patterns in real time.

matching.title: AI Merchant Matching Engine
matching.description: AI automatically routes merchant inventory to the most relevant distribution channel.

marketValidation.title: The Market Is Moving Now
marketValidation.stat2: Items in Google's Shopping Graph now including promotions
marketValidation.stat3: Global digital coupon market by 2035, growing at 18% CAGR
marketValidation.stat4: ChatGPT Instant Checkout transaction fee — same structure as Mezzofy's model

stakeholders.title: What AI Commerce Means for You

merchants.title: For Merchants
merchants.description: Your coupons become discoverable to 900M+ AI users the moment you list them

distributors.title: For Distributors & Partners
distributors.description: Embed a Mezzofy-powered AI concierge into your banking, telco, or HR app

developers.title: For Developers
developers.description: Integrate Mezzofy's coupon supply via ACP, UCP, or MCP endpoints

architecture.title: Integration Architecture
architecture.description: Expose Mezzofy supply inventory via ACP, UCP, and MCP endpoints. AI agents query in real time. Coupon tokens are validated on redemption. Mezzofy earns a transaction fee on every successful AI-referred redemption. One supply listing. Three protocol endpoints. Global AI distribution.

footerCta.title: AI Commerce Is Live. Your Inventory Should Be Too.
footerCta.description: Merchants already in the Mezzofy Exchange are discoverable by AI agents today. The window to be an early supply partner is now — before your competitors list their inventory first.

contact.title: Get Started with AI Commerce
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we'll show you how AI agents can distribute your coupon inventory
